'''zhathuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobla|dobla]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobla|dobla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhathuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæthijith|zhæthijith]] || [[word:zhæthijij|zhæthijij]] || [[word:zhæthijish|zhæthijish]] || [[word:zhæthiji|zhæthiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhathuthujuth|zhathuthujuth]] || [[word:zhathuthujuj|zhathuthujuj]] || [[word:zhathuthujush|zhathuthujush]] || [[word:zhathuthuju|zhathuthuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhathujuth|zhathujuth]] || [[word:zhathujuj|zhathujuj]] || [[word:zhathujush|zhathujush]] || [[word:zhathuju|zhathuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhathufjuth|zhathufjuth]] || [[word:zhathufjuj|zhathufjuj]] || [[word:zhathufjush|zhathufjush]] || [[word:zhathufjuf|zhathufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhathujuthu|zhathujuthu]] || [[word:zhathujuju|zhathujuju]] || [[word:zhathujushu|zhathujushu]] || [[word:zhathujuku|zhathujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhathujuth|zhathujuth]] || [[word:zhathujuj|zhathujuj]] || [[word:zhathujush|zhathujush]] || [[word:zhathuju|zhathuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhathujuthul|zhathujuthul]] || [[word:zhathujujul|zhathujujul]] || [[word:zhathujushul|zhathujushul]] || [[word:zhathujukul|zhathujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhathujuthuthu|zhathujuthuthu]] || [[word:zhathujujuju|zhathujujuju]] || [[word:zhathujushushu|zhathujushushu]] || [[word:zhathujuku|zhathujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhathujuthun|zhathujuthun]] || [[word:zhathujujun|zhathujujun]] || [[word:zhathujushun|zhathujushun]] || [[word:zhathujukun|zhathujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhathujuthuoro|zhathujuthuoro]] || [[word:zhathujujuoro|zhathujujuoro]] || [[word:zhathujushuoro|zhathujushuoro]] || [[word:zhathujukuoro|zhathujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
